lines.speaker: KAI
lines.line: I'm telling you, VICTORIA, this case stinks of corporate cover-up.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAI, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VICTORIA
lines.line: Kai, we can't just jump to conclusions. We need concrete evidence.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of VICTORIA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: KAI
lines.line: You're not seeing the big picture, VICTORIA. This is bigger than just a simple murder.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of VICTORIA, her brow furrowed in concern.

lines.speaker: VICTORIA
lines.line: Okay, Kai, but we need to tread carefully. One misstep and our licenses are revoked.
lines.visual_cue: Wide shot of KAI, his eyes flashing with intensity.

lines.speaker: KAI
lines.line: I've managed to hack into the victim's comms records. Something's not right.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAI, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VICTORIA
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of KAI, his eyes fixed on the holographic display in front of him.

lines.speaker: KAI
lines.line: The victim was involved in some shady dealings. I think we're looking at a conspiracy.
lines.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of VICTORIA, her eyes locked on KAI.

lines.speaker: VICTORIA
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of VICTORIA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: KAI
lines.line: We sneak in, gather evidence, and get out. Simple.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of VICTORIA, her eyes scanning the darkness.

lines.speaker: VICTORIA
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAI, his hand on the grip of his pistol.

lines.speaker: KAI
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of VICTORIA, a hint of fear in her eyes.
